title: elymus nutans
intro: Elymus nutans, also known as the drooping wildrye, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Elymus nutans can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
